Description: Define data model (Game, GameSession, Score). Document REST + WebSocket endpoints. Acceptance: data model reviewed; endpoints documented (create, join, move, scoreboard); spec checked against existing auth patterns.
Express/Next API routes or small FastAPI service. Health endpoint, CORS, basic middleware. Acceptance: GET /api/games/health returns 200; routes structured; CORS allows staging origin.

Board state management, move validation, win/draw detection. Session lifecycle: create, join, move, end. Acceptance: two players complete a game; winner detected; draw detected; invalid moves rejected.
Live scoreboard updates. Move broadcasting to connected clients. Acceptance: moves appear without refresh; scoreboard updates in real time; reconnection handled gracefully.
Create Game, GameSession, Score tables. Migration file in prisma/migrations/. Acceptance: npx prisma migrate deploy passes clean; indexes on FK and status columns; rollback SQL documented.
Minimal UI: create game, play board, scoreboard. Reuse existing auth/layout patterns. Acceptance: user can create a game; board renders clickable cells; scoreboard shows recent results.
Unit tests for game logic (win detection, moves). E2E smoke: scripts/test-e2e-game.sh. Acceptance: CI passes; E2E creates and plays a game; no regressions on video pipeline.
